General.Name: MIE Holdings Corp
General.Description: MIE Holdings Corporation explores, develops, produces, and sells crude oil and other petroleum products under Daan Oilfield production sharing contracts located in northeast China. It holds a 100% interest in the Daan project covering an area of 62,518 acres located in Songliao Basin, DaanJilin Province. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Sun Hung Kai Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
